chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 1766 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 946/23 (C/A) 3. For orders on CMA 1052/22 (Ex) 4. For orders on CMA 1053/22 5. For hearing of CMA 8575/21 (S/A) 6. For hearing of main case. 27.05.2025. Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioners. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for Municipal Committee Khairpur. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh. ************ The main grievance of the petitioners is that they have cattle sheds at locations in Khairpur city and they are being deprived by official respondents, therefore, they pray that the scheme of cattle colony Khairpur be completed and they may be allowed to participate in the allotment process. Comments have been filed by official respondents, however, today learned Additional Advocate General Sindh files statement on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur which reflects that 19 out of 25 sheds have been completed at the Cattle Colony Khairpur. Secretary Livestock & Fisheries Department suggested that the subject scheme may be closed at the reduce scope level as the same is lingering since long. Since 19 out of 25 sheds have already been completed, therefore, Deputy Commissioner Khairpur / Chairman of allotment committee is directed to make process in respect of allotment of sheds after advertisement and complete balloting process to the eligible persons within two months’ time. In view of this Constitution Petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
